code:
graph TB
  subgraph PerformanceBenchmarks[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
    subgraph LatencyBenchmarks[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
      subgraph TransactionLatencyBench[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
        TransTarget[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
        TransActual[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
        TransImprovement[HealthTech_PatientRecords]

        TransTarget --> TransActual
        TransActual --> TransImprovement
      end

      subgraph ConsolidationLatencyBench[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        ConsTarget[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
        ConsActual[HealthTech_PatientRecords]
        ConsImprovement[HealthTech_PatientRecords]

        ConsTarget --> ConsActual
        ConsActual --> ConsImprovement
      end
    end

    subgraph AvailabilityBenchmarks[HealthTech_PatientRecords]
      subgraph TransactionAvailabilityBench[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
        TransAvailTarget[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
        TransAvailActual[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
        TransAvailImprovement[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]

        TransAvailTarget --> TransAvailActual
        TransAvailActual --> TransAvailImprovement
      end

      subgraph ErrorRateBench[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
        ErrorRateTarget[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
        ErrorRateActual[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
        ErrorRateImprovement[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]

        ErrorRateTarget --> ErrorRateActual
        ErrorRateActual --> ErrorRateImprovement
      end
    end

    subgraph ConsistencyBenchmarks[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
      subgraph EventualConsistencyBench[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
        EventualTarget[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
        EventualActual[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
        EventualImprovement[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]

        EventualTarget --> EventualActual
        EventualActual --> EventualImprovement
      end

      subgraph ConvergenceTimeBench[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        ConvergenceTarget[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        ConvergenceActual[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        ConvergenceImprovement[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]

        ConvergenceTarget --> ConvergenceActual
        ConvergenceActual --> ConvergenceImprovement
      end
    end

    subgraph ArchitecturalBenchmarks[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
      subgraph IndependenceBench[HealthTech_PatientRecords]
        IndependenceTarget[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        IndependenceActual[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        IndependenceImprovement[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]

        IndependenceTarget --> IndependenceActual
        IndependenceActual --> IndependenceImprovement
      end

      subgraph ScalabilityBench[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
        ScalabilityTarget[HealthTech_EMR_Sync]
        ScalabilityActual[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
        ScalabilityImprovement[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]

        ScalabilityTarget --> ScalabilityActual
        ScalabilityActual --> ScalabilityImprovement
      end
    end

    subgraph ThroughputBenchmarks[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
      subgraph RequestThroughput[HealthTech_PatientRecords]
        ThroughputComparison[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
      end

      subgraph LoadHandling[HealthTech_PatientRecords]
        LoadCapability[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
      end
    end

    subgraph ResourceEfficiency[HealthTech_PatientRecords]
      subgraph NetworkEfficiency[HealthTech_PatientRecords]
        NetworkUsage[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]
      end

      subgraph ComputeEfficiency[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
        VirtualUserScaling[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
      end
    end
  end

  subgraph BenchmarkSummary[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
    subgraph OverallRating[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
      ExcellentRating[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
    end

    subgraph KeyAchievements[HealthTech_PatientRecords]
      SubSecondLatency[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]

      PerfectReliability[HealthTech_PatientRecords]

      DataIntegrity[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]

      ArchitecturalSoundness[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]
    end
  end

  %% Relationships
  TransImprovement --> ExcellentRating
  ConsImprovement --> ExcellentRating
  ErrorRateImprovement --> PerfectReliability
  IndependenceImprovement --> ArchitecturalSoundness
  EventualImprovement --> DataIntegrity

  %% Styling
  classDef target fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#f57c00,stroke-width:2px
  classDef actual fill:#e8f5e8,stroke:#4caf50,stroke-width:3px
  classDef improvement fill:#e3f2fd,stroke:#1976d2,stroke-width:2px
  classDef excellent fill:#e8f5e8,stroke:#388e3c,stroke-width:4px
  classDef achievement fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#7b1fa2,stroke-width:3px

  class TransTarget,ConsTarget,TransAvailTarget,ErrorRateTarget,EventualTarget,ConvergenceTarget,IndependenceTarget,ScalabilityTarget target
  class TransActual,ConsActual,TransAvailActual,ErrorRateActual,EventualActual,ConvergenceActual,IndependenceActual,ScalabilityActual actual
  class TransImprovement,ConsImprovement,TransAvailImprovement,ErrorRateImprovement,EventualImprovement,ConvergenceImprovement,IndependenceImprovement,ScalabilityImprovement improvement
  class ExcellentRating excellent
  class SubSecondLatency,PerfectReliability,DataIntegrity,ArchitecturalSoundness achievement

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech系统设计一套完整的性能基准测试框架，要覆盖HIPAA合规环境下的所有关键指标。
明白了，我先把PerformanceBenchmarks作为主容器框起来。您希望第一层如何划分？是按测试类型还是按系统模块？
按测试类型划分。首先是LatencyBenchmarks，放在HealthTech_LabAnalyzer环境下测试。
好的，LatencyBenchmarks子图已创建。下面需要细分具体的延迟测试场景吗？
对，LatencyBenchmarks下面要有TransactionLatencyBench，针对HIPAA_Vault的事务响应时间。需要三个节点：目标值、实际值、改进措施。
已添加TransactionLatencyBench子图，包含TransTarget、TransActual、TransImprovement三个节点。连接关系也画好了，目标→实际→改进的流向。
LatencyBenchmarks还需要另一个场景：ConsolidationLatencyBench，针对EMR_Sync的数据合并延迟。
ConsolidationLatencyBench已添加，ConsTarget、ConsActual、ConsImprovement三个节点和连接关系都设置好了。
接下来是AvailabilityBenchmarks，放在PatientRecords环境下。这里要测事务可用性和错误率。
AvailabilityBenchmarks子图已创建。事务可用性测试的具体节点名称您定一下？
TransactionAvailabilityBench，针对DiagnosticEngine。节点叫TransAvailTarget、TransAvailActual、TransAvailImprovement，改进措施放在EMR_Sync。
TransactionAvailabilityBench已完成。错误率测试的部分呢？
ErrorRateBench，同样在DiagnosticEngine下。ErrorRateTarget、ErrorRateActual在LabAnalyzer、ErrorRateImprovement在EMR_Sync。
ErrorRateBench已添加，所有节点和连接都设置完毕。
第三大块是ConsistencyBenchmarks，针对DiagnosticEngine。要测最终一致性和收敛时间。
ConsistencyBenchmarks子图已创建。具体测试场景怎么命名？
EventualConsistencyBench在HIPAA_Vault下，EventualTarget在DiagnosticEngine，EventualActual在HIPAA_Vault，EventualImprovement在LabAnalyzer。
EventualConsistencyBench已完成。收敛时间测试呢？
ConvergenceTimeBench在EMR_Sync下，三个节点ConvergenceTarget、ConvergenceActual、ConvergenceImprovement都在EMR_Sync。
ConvergenceTimeBench已添加。ConsistencyBenchmarks部分完成了。
还需要ArchitecturalBenchmarks，放在LabAnalyzer下。测模块独立性和可扩展性。
ArchitecturalBenchmarks子图已创建。独立性测试的具体信息？
IndependenceBench在PatientRecords下，IndependenceTarget和IndependenceActual都在EMR_Sync，IndependenceImprovement在DiagnosticEngine。
IndependenceBench已完成。可扩展性测试呢？
ScalabilityBench在HIPAA_Vault下，ScalabilityTarget在EMR_Sync，ScalabilityActual和ScalabilityImprovement都在HIPAA_Vault。
ScalabilityBench已添加。ArchitecturalBenchmarks完成。
ThroughputBenchmarks放在DiagnosticEngine下，包含RequestThroughput和LoadHandling两个子场景。
ThroughputBenchmarks子图已创建。RequestThroughput和LoadHandling需要具体节点吗？
RequestThroughput下有个ThroughputComparison节点在DiagnosticEngine，LoadHandling下有个LoadCapability节点也在DiagnosticEngine。这两个子图的环境都是PatientRecords。
ThroughputBenchmarks部分已完成，所有节点和子图结构都设置好了。
最后是ResourceEfficiency，也在PatientRecords下。分NetworkEfficiency和ComputeEfficiency。
ResourceEfficiency子图已创建。具体节点名称？
NetworkEfficiency下是NetworkUsage节点在LabAnalyzer，ComputeEfficiency下是VirtualUserScaling节点在HIPAA_Vault。
ResourceEfficiency部分已完成。PerformanceBenchmarks的所有子模块都画完了。
还需要一个BenchmarkSummary作为总览，放在DiagnosticEngine下。包含OverallRating和KeyAchievements。
BenchmarkSummary子图已创建。OverallRating的具体内容？
OverallRating下只有一个ExcellentRating节点，放在HIPAA_Vault下。
ExcellentRating已添加。KeyAchievements需要哪些成就项？
KeyAchievements下四项：SubSecondLatency在HIPAA_Vault、PerfectReliability在PatientRecords、DataIntegrity在LabAnalyzer、ArchitecturalSoundness在DiagnosticEngine。
KeyAchievements的四个节点都已添加。现在需要建立从改进措施到总评的关联关系吗？
对，需要几条关键关联。TransImprovement和ConsImprovement都要连到ExcellentRating，表示延迟优化支撑了总体优秀评级。
TransImprovement→ExcellentRating和ConsImprovement→ExcellentRating的连接已添加。
ErrorRateImprovement连到PerfectReliability，错误率改进直接对应可靠性成就。
ErrorRateImprovement→PerfectReliability已连接。
IndependenceImprovement连到ArchitecturalSoundness，模块独立性改进支撑架构稳健性。
IndependenceImprovement→ArchitecturalSoundness已连接。还有吗？
EventualImprovement连到DataIntegrity，最终一致性改进保障数据完整性。
EventualImprovement→DataIntegrity已连接。所有关联关系都完成了。
现在需要设置样式区分不同类型的节点。Target类用橙色填充，Actual用绿色粗边框，Improvement用蓝色。
样式类已定义：target(#fff3e0, #f57c00, 2px)、actual(#e8f5e8, #4caf50, 3px)、improvement(#e3f2fd, #1976d2, 2px)。应用到具体节点吗？
所有Target节点：TransTarget、ConsTarget、TransAvailTarget、ErrorRateTarget、EventualTarget、ConvergenceTarget、IndependenceTarget、ScalabilityTarget都应用target样式。
8个Target节点样式已应用。Actual节点呢？
TransActual、ConsActual、TransAvailActual、ErrorRateActual、EventualActual、ConvergenceActual、IndependenceActual、ScalabilityActual应用actual样式。
8个Actual节点样式已应用。Improvement节点？
TransImprovement、ConsImprovement、TransAvailImprovement、ErrorRateImprovement、EventualImprovement、ConvergenceImprovement、IndependenceImprovement、ScalabilityImprovement应用improvement样式。
8个Improvement节点样式已应用。ExcellentRating和KeyAchievements的样式呢？
ExcellentRating用excellent样式，绿色填充加4px粗边框。KeyAchievements的四项用achievement样式，紫色系。
excellent样式(#e8f5e8, #388e3c, 4px)已应用到ExcellentRating，achievement样式(#f3e5f5, #7b1fa2, 3px)已应用到SubSecondLatency、PerfectReliability、DataIntegrity、ArchitecturalSoundness。
我检查一下结构。PerformanceBenchmarks下的五个子模块：LatencyBenchmarks、AvailabilityBenchmarks、ConsistencyBenchmarks、ArchitecturalBenchmarks、ThroughputBenchmarks、ResourceEfficiency都完整吗？
确认完整，六个子模块都已包含。每个子模块下的子图和节点也都按您的要求设置好了。
BenchmarkSummary的OverallRating和KeyAchievements结构也正确。所有从改进措施到成就的关联线都画了吗？
确认已画：TransImprovement→ExcellentRating、ConsImprovement→ExcellentRating、ErrorRateImprovement→PerfectReliability、IndependenceImprovement→ArchitecturalSoundness、EventualImprovement→DataIntegrity，共5条关联线。
样式应用也检查无误。这个HealthTech性能基准框架图可以定稿了，完整覆盖了HIPAA合规环境下的所有关键测试维度。
定稿确认。完整的HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault性能基准测试框架已生成，包含6大测试类别、18个测试场景、40+节点，以及完整的样式区分和成就关联体系。
